transcript: Speaker A: Hii Guys, I'm here at Upvan Lake and... oh shoot so, sorry. I was busy filming this video and I couldn't see you. hope you aren't mad at me. Speaker B: Arey No problem yaar. par tu achha english bolteys. kuthe course lavles ka? [No problem buddy. But you speak good English. Did you join any course?] Speaker A: nahi yaar mi kuthe course nahi kela. SpeakX mhanun ek app ahe, tyachat maza personal AI coach ahe. Roz fakt 10-15 minutes practice karte. [No, I didn't do any course. There's an app called SpeakX with a personal AI coach. I just practice 10-15 minutes daily.] Speaker B: manje swasta ahe ka? [So is it cheap?] Speaker A: ek cup coffee chay kimtitet. ani best part, first 20 ques ek dum free ahet. Tula pan ashi fluent English shikaychi asel tar link khali ahe, aataach download kar. [At the cost of a cup of coffee. And the best part, the first 20 questions are absolutely free. If you want to learn fluent English, download via the link below.]
on_screen_text: Hii Guys, I'm here at Upvan Lake, oh shoot so, sorry, I was busy filming this video, hope you aren't mad at me, Arey No problem yaar, par tu achha english bolteys, kuthe course lavles ka?, nahi yaar mi kuthe course nahi kela, SpeakX mhanun ek app ahe, personal AI coach ahe, Roz fakt 10-15 minutes practice karte, manje swasta ahe ka?, ek cup coffee chay kimtitet, first 20 ques ek dum free ahet, tula pan ashi fluent English shikaychi asel, tar link khali ahe, aataach download kar
summary: A girl bumps into a guy while filming and apologizes in fluent English. When he asks where she learned it, she credits the SpeakX app's daily AI coaching, highlighting its low cost and free trial questions.
